asm3model
=========

Compiled extension package for ASM3 unit models.

Quick import
------------

.. code-block:: python

   from asm3model import asm3, combiner, carboncombiner, hyddelay, settler1d

Contents
--------

   :maxdepth: 1
   :caption: Documentation

   installation
   api
   examples
   acknowledgement
   citation_license_contact
